hypothesis: The sample-scale p90/residual failure is concentrated in identifiable price-tail and new-offset/slug buckets, enabling a bounded local proxy before any further shadow.

key_findings.repair75_new_bad_shape: repair75 improved raw candidates to 87 but failed sample, p90, and residual gates: p90=1.09, residual_qty=21.25, candidates<100.
key_findings.repair60_less_bad_but_failed: repair60 is less residual-heavy than repair75 but still failed: p90=1.03, residual_qty=15.0, candidates=69.
key_findings.price_tail_signal: Top residual lots include high-price YES lots up to px=0.58 for repair75 and px=0.47 for repair60; p90/residual failure worsens when the expanded window admits these price-tail residual lots.
key_findings.offset_window_signal: The old and new runs overlap only 3 slugs; new-only slugs dominate residual and p90 failure, so the next test should be local proxy filtering by price-tail/offset bucket, not another same shadow window.

bounded_mechanism_lead.label: price_tail_or_offset_subset_proxy
bounded_mechanism_lead.description: Before any further EC2 shadow, locally test deployable seed price-tail caps such as seed_px_hi 0.48/0.45 and/or offset subset controls against summary-derived bad buckets. The goal is to reduce high-price residual lots and p90 while preserving enough candidates.
bounded_mechanism_lead.why_bounded: The attribution points to top residual lot price and new-offset/slug concentration, both observable pre-trade or pre-run without events JSONL.

next_executable_action.action: Run local no-network proxy scorer over pulled summaries to simulate candidate/residual removal for seed_px_hi caps and offset/slug exclusion buckets; no SSH/shadow/events.
next_executable_action.pass_keep: KEEP if a cap/subset proxy projects p90<=1.0 and residual_qty<=10 while keeping projected candidates close to or above 100 for sample scale.
next_executable_action.unknown: UNKNOWN if summary-only data cannot distinguish seed price from realized residual lot price and requires event-lite fields.
next_executable_action.discard: DISCARD if every bounded cap/subset that fixes p90/residual destroys sample/PnL.
